intro:
Hinge has a strong presence in the UK. Embir launched in the UK as one of its primary markets — with verified profiles, bidirectional orientation filtering, and full features free at launch.

Hinge has strong traction in UK cities. Embir offers verified profiles and universal LGBTQ+ inclusivity that Hinge lacks.

sections.title: Embir in the UK — the better alternative
sections.content: Hinge has name recognition in the UK, but Embir offers something fundamentally better: strict bidirectional orientation filtering, verified profiles, human moderation, and complete free access during launch.
highlights: the UK is a primary launch market for Embir
Free during launch — no subscription required

verdict: In the UK, Embir is the best alternative to Hinge in 2026: verified profiles, bidirectional filtering, universal LGBTQ+ inclusivity, and free at launch.
ctaText: Join Embir in the UK — free at launch

faq.q: Is Embir available in the UK?
faq.a: Yes. the UK is one of Embir's primary launch markets. The founding community is active and growing.

faq.q: How does Embir compare to Hinge in the UK?
faq.a: Embir offers verified profiles, bidirectional filtering, LGBTQ+ inclusivity, and free access that Hinge doesn't match.
Yes. Core features are free during the launch phase.
